name: Caught on a Deserted Island
description: You are stranded on a tiny tropical island with a single palm tree. Jennifer is your survival companion. Practice discussing search signals, finding fresh water, and building a shelter.

name: Stuck in the Middle of the Sea
description: You are lost in a small rowboat in a vast, calm ocean at sunset. Jennifer is your fellow passenger. Discuss food rationing, navigating by stars, and keeping hopes high.

name: Stuck in the Safari Jungle
description: Your vintage jeep is stuck in deep mud on a safari trail surrounded by wild foliage. Jennifer is the safari guide. Decide how to get the vehicle out and handle potential wild animals.

name: Lost in a Foreign City
description: You are carrying a heavy backpack, holding a map, and completely lost in a historic European city square. Jennifer is a friendly local. Practice asking for directions and local tips.

name: Lost Passport in Paris
description: Stranded in France without identification. Jennifer is your guide. Discuss reporting the loss, translating at police stations, and visiting the embassy.

name: Missing a Flight in London
description: Stranded at Heathrow airport after missing your connection. Jennifer is the airport agent. Practice rebooking and arranging vouchers.

name: Food Poisoning in Bangkok
description: Stranded in a hotel room feeling very ill. Jennifer is the hotel helper. Practice describing symptoms and getting medical assistance.

name: Stolen Wallet in Rome
description: Your wallet was stolen by pickpockets near the Colosseum. Jennifer is a helpful officer. Discuss cancelling cards and filing a report.

name: Car Breakdown in Death Valley
description: Your car broke down in a hot desert with no cellular signal. Jennifer is your passenger. Practice checking supplies and planning.

name: Blizzard Lock-in in Swiss Alps
description: Stuck in a mountain cabin during a major snowstorm with no electricity. Jennifer is the caretaker. Discuss rationing food and firewood.
